questionHtml:
Three resistors are connected as shown. What is the value of the total resistance between X and Y?

                                                    

A.     1.5 Ω

B.     1.9 Ω

C.     6.0 Ω

D.     8.0 Ω

meta.title: Three resistors are connected as shown. What is the value of the total resistance between X and Y? A. 1.5 Ω B. 1.9 Ω C. 6.0 Ω D. 8.0 Ω
